hero.title: Melanie Busse
hero.subTitle: Senior Fullstack Developer
hero.description: Over 21 years of experience in the conception and development of complex software systems. Expert in Java backends and modern web frontends with Angular and TypeScript.

metadata.homeDescription: Portfolio of Melanie Busse – Fullstack Software Developer focusing on React, Next.js, and Java. Explore my projects and tech stack.
metadata.projectsDescription: An overview of my software projects. Ranging from large-scale enterprise applications for the Federal Employment Agency to modern, personal React and Next.js projects.
metadata.aboutDescription: Learn more about my journey as a developer: 19 years of IT experience, solid Java expertise, and state-of-the-art fullstack training.
metadata.educationDescription: My educational background: Degree in Business Informatics from the University of Paderborn, vocational training as an industrial clerk, and an intensive Fullstack Bootcamp.
metadata.downloadDescription: Here you can find and download my complete application documents, academic degrees, and certificates regarding my current qualifications.
metadata.legalDescription: Legal information and imprint for Melanie Busse.
metadata.privacyDescription: Privacy policy for the portfolio website of Melanie Busse.
